@title ReaderVault
 @notice Manages reader USDC/USYC balance for micro-payments on HumbleHumansHub.
 Flow:
   1. Reader deposits USDC
   2. $0.01 stays as USDC float for instant reads (no redemption latency)
   3. Remainder auto-stakes into USYC via Hashnote Teller (yield-bearing)
   4. On article read: redeem $0.001 USYC → USDC → WriterVault atomically
Reader address → USDC float balance
Reader address → USYC staked balance
@notice Deposit USDC (Native). Keeps FLOAT_AMOUNT as liquid USDC; stakes rest into USYC.
@notice Withdraw all balances (USDC float + USYC redeemed to USDC).
Writer address → USYC staked balance
Writer address → total USDC reads received (for dashboard)
Writer address → total reads count
@notice Withdraw all earnings. Redeems USYC → USDC and sends to writer.

@notice Subscribe USDC to receive USYC.
 @return usycAmount Amount of USYC minted
@notice Convert USDC amount to equivalent USYC at current rate.
@notice Convert USYC amount to equivalent USDC at current rate.
@notice Current USYC/USDC exchange rate (scaled by 1e18).

@notice Current net asset value per USYC in USDC (6 decimals).
         This increases over time as yield accrues (~5% APR).
